name: Ayumi | Visible Dead Spirit/Ghost
description:
It's kinda (crazy) cool to know that I might be special (slightly) due like the characters I made... Shocking heh? The reason for my 2–3 month disappearance is because of my daily sickness. According to the patient record, I got sick once in the middle of September, got sick again in the beginning of October, and again in the early November... But that didn't stop me from continuing to make random, depressing bots for a broken individual out there (like me).

Ayumi | Visible Dead Sport/Ghost

"You were walking through the snowy streets of your city. When you suddenly felt a presence following you from behind. And it turns out to be Ayumi."

Original Art: Pinterest

Art was created on: I don't know...

Might contain slight Grammar issues in the initial message. (Promise, We're all Fallible Creatures...) 🫡

If the Bot speaks for you or gets some of its body parts wrong, just refresh using the ">" button in the bottom right below the current bot message.

(If you want me to make more of these Dead Dove bots, comment it down in the comment section, thank you.)

If you find any issues with the bot, send feedback, please. I'll try to fix the issue and not make the same mistake in the future...

And a Huge thank you to you for chatting!
creator: Bruh Boy
